summary: Tested Business Days (Jornadas de Trabajo) feature for POS System. All backend API endpoints working correctly (9/9 tests passed). UI components verified: sidebar indicator (sun/moon), business day management dialog, and PaymentScreen blocking when no business day is open.
passed_tests: GET /api/business-days/check - Returns has_open_day, business_date, day_id, opened_at
GET /api/business-days/current - Returns business_day object and stats when open
GET /api/business-days/history - Returns list of past jornadas
POST /api/business-days/authorize - Admin PIN (10000) authorized for open/close
POST /api/business-days/authorize - Invalid PIN (0000) correctly rejected with 401
POST /api/business-days/authorize - Cashier PIN (4321) rejected with 403 (no permission)
POST /api/business-days/open - Creates new jornada with business_date, ref (JORNADA-2026-XXXXX)
POST /api/business-days/close - Closes jornada with stats summary
POST /api/bills/{id}/pay - Returns 403 with message 'No hay jornada de trabajo abierta' when closed
UI: Sidebar indicator shows green sun when jornada open
UI: Sidebar indicator shows pulsing red moon when jornada closed
UI: Business day management dialog shows stats (Ventas, Efectivo, Tarjeta, Facturas)
UI: PaymentScreen shows 'JORNADA NO ABIERTA' blocking screen when no jornada
UI: 'Abrir Jornada de Trabajo' button visible on blocking screen
UI: PIN authorization dialog works for open/close operations
critical_code_review_comments: business_days.py L189-265: Open endpoint properly validates existing open day, generates unique ref (JORNADA-YYYY-NNNNN)
business_days.py L268-352: Close endpoint includes stats calculation and optional force_close for open shifts
billing.py L345-351: Pay endpoint correctly checks business_day before processing payment
Layout.js L248-286: Sidebar indicator with proper data-testid attributes for testing
PaymentScreen.js L845-920: Blocking screen with proper UI, 'Abrir Jornada' button, and back navigation

features_verified.check_business_day_api: PASS - Returns has_open_day boolean and business_date if open
features_verified.open_business_day_api: PASS - Creates jornada with ref JORNADA-2026-00006, requires admin PIN
features_verified.close_business_day_api: PASS - Closes jornada, calculates stats, supports force_close
features_verified.payment_blocking_api: PASS - POST /api/bills/{id}/pay returns 403 when no jornada
features_verified.sidebar_indicator_open: PASS - Green sun icon with date (e.g., '02-23')
features_verified.business_day_dialog: PASS - Shows JORNADA ABIERTA/SIN JORNADA with stats
features_verified.payment_blocking_ui: PASS - Full blocking screen with 'JORNADA NO ABIERTA' message
features_verified.open_from_blocking_screen: PASS - 'Abrir Jornada de Trabajo' button triggers auth dialog

context_for_next_testing_agent: Business Days (Jornadas de Trabajo) feature fully tested. System requires open jornada for payments. Admin PIN 10000 can authorize open/close. Cashier PIN 4321 cannot authorize. PaymentScreen shows blocking screen when no jornada. Sidebar indicator shows sun (green) when open, moon (red pulsing) when closed. Current jornada reference format: JORNADA-YYYY-NNNNN.

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints are real
